rationale: The cited 2015 JMR paper appears methodologically and conceptually aligned with the citing paper’s stated move from VOI/localization approaches to whole-brain decoding of psychological content: the cited work explicitly introduces model-based fMRI decoding for “what” brand associations and distributed representations. Given this clear overlap in consumer-neuroscience framing and decoding logic (rather than a generic background mention), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
